sections.rationale: Unique composition: eyebrow + two-line headline with strike-through motif + lede + dual CTA + inline 7-step pipeline diagram with phase-bar. Generic hero can't express the diagram.
Split layout with left body block + right 'need → shipped site' diagram with 7 waypoints. Diagram is custom visual.
content: diagram: need → site with 7 waypoint labels

sections.rationale: Eyebrow + h2 + sub + two phase tags + 7-node grid flow. Similar diagram shape as hero-pipeline, but standalone section-scale.
Split layout: body left, faux-terminal mock right showing skill invocations. Terminal is a structural content type.
Eyebrow + h2 + lede + 5-host grid with active-state + availability badge. Similar to cards but with badge + active state.
content: 5 host tiles: name + status badge, one active

sections.rationale: Split layout: body + CTA left, monospace tree listing right. Tree has specific coloring for dir/star/comment.
Centered h2 + lede + prominent install-command box with copy button + fine-print + GitHub secondary CTA. Install-box is a bespoke component.

hero.note: Replaced by custom hero-pipeline. Keep JS/CSS untouched; don't author .hero content.
